     1→import {
     2→  LinkFavicon,
     3→  RendererWrapper,
     4→  RubyRenderer,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'
     6→import { createElement, type ReactNode } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as tableStyles from '../table.css'
     9→
    10→function textToSlug(text: string): string {
    11→  return text
    12→    .toLowerCase()
    13→    .trim()
    14→    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    15→    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    16→    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    17→}
    18→
    19→function extractText(node: any): string {
    20→  if (node.text) return node.text
    21→  if (node.children) return node.children.map(extractText).join('')
    22→  return ''
    23→}
    24→
    25→export function renderBuiltinNode(
    26→  node: any,
    27→  key: string,
    28→  children: ReactNode[] | null,
    29→  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    30→  textContent?: string,
    31→): ReactNode {
    32→  switch (node.type) {
    33→    case 'root':
    34→      return <>{children}</>
    35→    case 'paragraph': {
    36→      const align = node.format
    37→        ? ({ textAlign: node.format } as const)
    38→        : undefined
    39→      return (
    40→        <p key={key} className="rich-paragraph" style={align}>
    41→          {children}
    42→        </p>
    43→      )
    44→    }
    45→    case 'heading': {
    46→      const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
    47→      const text = textContent || extractText(node)
    48→      const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    49→      let slug = baseSlug
    50→      if (baseSlug) {
    51→        const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    52→        if (count !== undefined) {
    53→          slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
    54→          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    55→        } else {
    56→          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    57→        }
    58→      }
    59→      return (
    60→        <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
    61→          {slug && (
    62→            <a className="rich-heading-anchor" tabIndex={0} href={`#${slug}`} />
    63→          )}
    64→          {children}
    65→        </Tag>
    66→      )
    67→    }
    68→    case 'quote':
    69→      return (
    70→        <blockquote key={key} className="rich-quote">
    71→          {children}
    72→        </blockquote>
    73→      )
    74→    case 'list': {
    75→      const Tag = node.listType === 'number' ? 'ol' : 'ul'
    76→      const cls =
    77→        node.listType === 'number'
    78→          ? 'rich-list-ol'
    79→          : node.listType === 'check'
    80→            ? 'rich-checklist rich-list-ul'
    81→            : 'rich-list-ul'
    82→      return (
    83→        <Tag
    84→          key={key}
    85→          className={cls}
    86→          start={node.start !== 1 ? node.start : undefined}
    87→        >
    88→          {children}
    89→        </Tag>
    90→      )
    91→    }
    92→    case 'listitem': {
    93→      const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
    94→      const hasNestedList = node.children?.some((c: any) => c.type === 'list')
    95→      let cls: string
    96→      if (hasNestedList) {
    97→        cls = 'rich-list-nested-item'
    98→      } else if (isChecklist) {
    99→        cls = node.checked
   100→          ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked'
   101→          : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked'
   102→      } else {
   103→        cls = 'rich-list-item'
   104→      }
   105→      return (
   106→        <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>
   107→          {children}
   108→        </li>
   109→      )
   110→    }
   111→    case 'link':
   112→      return (
   113→        <a
   114→          key={key}
   115→          className="rich-link"
   116→          href={node.url}
   117→          target={node.target || '_blank'}
   118→          rel={node.rel || 'noopener'}
   119→        >
   120→          <LinkFavicon href={node.url} />
   121→          {children}
   122→        </a>
   123→      )
   124→    case 'autolink':
   125→      return (
   126→        <a
   127→          key={key}
   128→          className="rich-link"
   129→          href={node.url}
   130→          target="_blank"
   131→          rel="noopener"
   132→        >
   133→          <LinkFavicon href={node.url} />
   134→          {children}
   135→        </a>
   136→      )
   137→    case 'horizontalrule':
   138→      return <hr key={key} className="rich-hr" />
   139→    case 'table':
   140→      return (
   141→        <div key={key} className={tableStyles.tableWrapper}>
   142→          <table className={tableStyles.table}>{children}</table>
   143→        </div>
   144→      )
   145→    case 'tablerow':
   146→      return <tr key={key}>{children}</tr>
   147→    case 'tablecell': {
   148→      const CellTag = node.headerState ? 'th' : 'td'
   149→      const cls = node.headerState
   150→        ? tableStyles.tableHead
   151→        : tableStyles.tableCell
   152→      return (
   153→        <CellTag
   154→          key={key}
   155→          className={cls}
   156→          colSpan={node.colSpan > 1 ? node.colSpan : undefined}
   157→        >
   158→          {children}
   159→        </CellTag>
   160→      )
   161→    }
   162→    case 'details': {
   163→      const summary = node.summary || ''
   164→      return (
   165→        <details
   166→          key={key}
   167→          className="rich-details"
   168→          open={node.open || undefined}
   169→        >
   170→          <summary className="rich-details-summary">
   171→            <span className="rich-details-summary-text">{summary}</span>
   172→            <span className="rich-details-chevron">
   173→              <svg
   174→                width="20"
   175→                height="20"
   176→                viewBox="0 0 20 20"
   177→                fill="none"
   178→                stroke="currentColor"
   179→                strokeWidth="1.5"
   180→                strokeLinecap="round"
   181→                strokeLinejoin="round"
   182→              >
   183→                <path d="M6 8L10 12L14 8" />
   184→              </svg>
   185→            </span>
   186→          </summary>
   187→          <div className="rich-details-content">{children}</div>
   188→        </details>
   189→      )
   190→    }
   191→    case 'spoiler':
   192→      return (
   193→        <span key={key} className="rich-spoiler" role="button" tabIndex={0}>
   194→          {children}
   195→        </span>
   196→      )
   197→    case 'ruby':
   198→      return createElement(RendererWrapper as any, {
   199→        key,
   200→        rendererKey: 'Ruby',
   201→        defaultRenderer: RubyRenderer,
   202→        props: {
   203→          reading: node.reading ?? '',
   204→          children,
   205→        },
   206→      })
   207→    case 'code':
   208→      return (
   209→        <pre key={key} className="rich-code-block">
   210→          <code>{children}</code>
   211→        </pre>
   212→      )
   213→    case 'code-highlight':
   214→      return <span key={key}>{node.text}</span>
   215→    case 'linebreak':
   216→      return <br key={key} />
   217→    case 'tab':
   218→      return <span key={key}>{'  '}</span>
   219→    default:
   220→      return null
   221→  }
   222→}
   223→
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-01 08:17:27Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I understand the architecture. The user wants to be able to override `renderBuiltinNode` for specific node types in `RichRenderer`. 

Currently, `renderBuiltinNode` is a function that handles rendering of built-in Lexical nodes (paragraph, heading, link, etc.). The `RendererConfig` is used for custom decorator nodes via `RendererWrapper`, but `renderBuiltinNode` has no override mechanism.

The cleanest approach would be to add a `builtinNodeRenderers` (or similar) prop to `RichRendererProps` that maps node types to custom render functions. When rendering a builtin node, it would first check if there's an override, and if so, use it; otherwise fall back to the default `renderBuiltinNode`.


I'm sketching out the API design with a type for the renderer function and a new prop that accepts overrides keyed by node type, so users can customize how specific built-in nodes render.

Now I need to implement this by threading the overrides through the rendering pipeline and checking for an override before falling back to the default renderer.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-01 08:18:43Z)**_

已完成。改动摘要：

**`types.ts`** — 新增 `BuiltinNodeRenderer` 类型，签名为 `(node, key, children, defaultRenderer) => ReactNode`，其中 `defaultRenderer` 可调用以回退至默认渲染。`RichRendererProps` 增 `builtinNodeOverrides?: Record<string, BuiltinNodeRenderer>` 属性。

**`RichRenderer.tsx`** — `builtinNodeOverrides` 自 `RichRenderer` → `renderEditorToReact` → `renderTree` 逐层透传，含嵌套内容渲染及递归子节点。于 `renderBuiltinNode` 调用前，以 `serialized.type` 查表，命中则调覆写函数，否则走默认路径。

**用法示例**：

```tsx
<RichRenderer
  value={value}
  builtinNodeOverrides={{
    link: (node, key, children, defaultRenderer) => (
      <a key={key} href={node.url} className="custom-link">
        {children}
      </a>
    ),
    paragraph: (_node, _key, _children, defaultRenderer) => {
      // 亦可回退默认渲染
      return defaultRenderer()
    },
  }}
/>
```

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-01 08:19:51Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-static-renderer/README.md`

```text
     1→# @haklex/rich-static-renderer
     2→
     3→Lexical 富文本的只读渲染引擎（Headless + React 输出）。  
     4→用于把 `SerializedEditorState` 渲染成可展示的 React 内容。
     5→
     6→## 包定位
     7→
     8→- 不提供编辑能力
     9→- 适合文章详情页、评论展示、SSR 输出
    10→- 默认支持 `@haklex/rich-editor` 内置节点（`allNodes`）
    11→
    12→## 安装
    13→
    14→```bash
    15→pnpm add @haklex/rich-static-renderer @haklex/rich-editor lexical react react-dom
    16→```
    17→
    18→## 快速开始
    19→
    20→```tsx
    21→import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-static-renderer'
    22→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
    23→import '@haklex/rich-editor/style.css'
    24→
    25→export function Article({
    26→  value,
    27→}: {
    28→  value: SerializedEditorState
    29→}) {
    30→  return <RichRenderer value={value} variant="article" theme="light" />
    31→}
    32→```
    33→
    34→## API
    35→
    36→```ts
    37→interface RichRendererProps {
    38→  value: SerializedEditorState
    39→  variant?: 'article' | 'comment' | 'note'
    40→  theme?: 'light' | 'dark'
    41→  className?: string
    42→  style?: CSSProperties
    43→  as?: keyof React.JSX.IntrinsicElements
    44→  rendererConfig?: RendererConfig
    45→  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    46→}
    47→```
    48→
    49→字段说明：
    50→
    51→- `value`：Lexical JSON（必填）
    52→- `as`：渲染容器标签，默认 `div`
    53→- `rendererConfig`：覆写某些节点的渲染组件（Image/CodeBlock/...）
    54→- `extraNodes`：注册扩展节点（如 Tldraw、Embed、Gallery、CodeSnippet）
    55→
    56→## 与增强渲染器一起用
    57→
    58→```tsx
    59→import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-static-renderer'
    60→import {
    61→  codeSnippetNodes,
    62→  embedNodes,
    63→  enhancedRendererConfig,
    64→  galleryNodes,
    65→  TldrawNode,
    66→} from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
    67→
    68→import '@haklex/rich-editor/style.css'
    69→import '@haklex/rich-renderers/style.css'
    70→import '@haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet/style.css'
    71→import '@haklex/rich-ext-embed/style.css'
    72→import 'katex/dist/katex.min.css'
    73→import 'tldraw/tldraw.css'
    74→
    75→const extraNodes = [
    76→  TldrawNode,
    77→  ...embedNodes,
    78→  ...galleryNodes,
    79→  ...codeSnippetNodes,
    80→]
    81→
    82→<RichRenderer
    83→  value={value}
    84→  rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    85→  extraNodes={extraNodes}
    86→/>
    87→```
    88→
    89→## 渲染行为说明
    90→
    91→- 内部使用 `@lexical/headless` 构建只读 editor，再将节点树转为 React
    92→- 标题会自动生成 slug 与锚点（重复标题自动去重）
    93→- 脚注会先预处理编号，再统一渲染引用与定义
    94→- `Alert/Banner/Grid` 等嵌套内容通过 `NestedContentRendererProvider` 递归渲染
    95→
    96→## 设计模式
    97→
    98→### 1) 节点注册与渲染器覆写解耦
    99→
   100→- 节点协议（JSON 结构）由 Node class 决定
   101→- 显示层由 `rendererConfig` 决定
   102→- 扩展节点只需通过 `extraNodes` 注册，不要求侵入核心渲染器
   103→
   104→### 2) Static / Edit 拆分协作
   105→
   106→`@haklex/rich-static-renderer` 只消费静态节点。  
   107→编辑态重依赖（Popover、Dialog 等）应该放在 edit 节点/编辑包里，不进入只读包。
   108→
   109→## 常见问题
   110→
   111→### Q1: 为什么有些节点不显示？
   112→
   113→通常是忘了注册扩展节点（`extraNodes`），例如 `embed`、`tldraw`、`gallery`、`code-snippet`。
   114→
   115→### Q2: 为什么公式样式不对？
   116→
   117→需要手动引入：
   118→
   119→```ts
   120→import 'katex/dist/katex.min.css'
   121→```
   122→
   123→### Q3: 为什么 tldraw 画布样式错乱？
   124→
   125→需要手动引入：
   126→
   127→```ts
   128→import 'tldraw/tldraw.css'
   129→```
